title: Number of Ways of Cutting a Pizza
description: Implement LeetCode 1444, Number of Ways of Cutting a Pizza. The method must follow the stated parameter order and return the exact deterministic result. Inputs use Python values; callers need not preserve mutable inputs unless the original problem explicitly requires it. This pack paraphrases the public task and does not include platform hidden tests.
input_contract: Parameters in order: pizza, k. Inputs satisfy the public LeetCode constraints for this problem.
output_contract: Return a JSON-serializable int using exact comparison; list order is significant where the original problem defines an ordered result.
